reviews.comment:
El horario del servi compras es:
- TODOS LOS DÍAS DE 07:00 a 23:00 (incluso los feriados).
.
El local, si bien es muy chico, está bien atendido, y, con algo de variedad. Afuera (al aire libre) hay espacio debajo de árboles, para distenderse y/o comer algo. En general es limpio; sus baños son amplios (aunque el papel higiénico está muy mal ubicado).

(Translated by Google)
The convenience store's hours are:
- EVERY DAY FROM 7:00 AM TO 11:00 PM (including holidays).

The store, although very small, has good service and a decent selection. Outside (in the open air) there's space under the trees to relax and/or have something to eat. It's generally clean; the restrooms are spacious (although the toilet paper is poorly placed).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/9804125904812315909/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnaTgyUHBRRRAB
